display.purpose: App title 'FlowForge'. Solid accent color, single weight.

body.purpose: All reading text — descriptions, filter labels, snackbar messages.

label.purpose: Badges, priority tags, timestamps, category pills.

shadows.name: toast
shadows.purpose: Only shadow in the system. Used for snackbar and focus timer to signal break-out-of-flow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary actions — Add Todo, Snackbar Undo, Start Focus.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(52% 0.14 38); color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(48% 0.16 38); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(52% 0.14 38); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Icon actions — drag handle, delete, focus, close.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: none; color: oklch(42% 0.03 70); padding: 6px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(52% 0.14 38); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text fields — add todo title, search, category.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="What do you need to do?">
components.css: .ds-input { padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 80); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; background: #ffffff; color: oklch(15% 0.02 70); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(42% 0.03 70); opacity: 1; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(52% 0.14 38); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Status filters, category and priority badges.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 6px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 80); border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(93% 0.008 80); color: oklch(42% 0.03 70); cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-chip.active { background: oklch(52% 0.14 38); color: #fff; border-color: oklch(52% 0.14 38); }

components.name: Todo Card
components.description: Individual todo item — title, meta, priority tint, subtasks.
components.html: Design project architecturehigh
components.css: .ds-todo-card { padding: 16px; background: oklch(93% 0.008 80); border-radius: 12px; } .ds-todo-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-todo-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(15% 0.02 70); flex: 1; } .ds-badge { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: #ffffff; color: oklch(55% 0.025 70); }

components.name: Select Input
components.css: .ds-select { padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 80); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; background: #ffffff; color: oklch(15% 0.02 70); outline: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-select:focus { border-color: oklch(52% 0.14 38); }

narrative.overview: FlowForge is a personal workshop, not a dashboard. It is the bench where you lay out your tasks, decide what matters, and get to work. The interface is warm but not cozy, structured but not rigid — like a well-organized workbench where every tool has its place and nothing is in the way. This system explicitly rejects the SaaS-generic aesthetic: no glassmorphism, no gradient text, no pastel accent colors, no side-stripe borders. Depth comes from tonal layering (surface sits on background at a perceptible lightness step), never from shadows or blur.
keyCharacteristics: Warm without being soft. The terracotta accent carries the brand; nothing is playful or gamified.
Surfaces are solid, not translucent. One layer of depth (background to surface), no nesting.
Typography does the heavy lifting for hierarchy. Color supports, not leads.
Every interaction has a purpose. No animation for its own sake.
Intimate scale: one person, one tool, one screen at a time.

rules.name: The One-Step Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one surface level above the page background. Cards and inputs share this level. No nested cards, no lifted modals, no 'surface-on-surface' depth.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: No second typeface enters the system. Weight contrast (400 / 500 / 600) replaces what another family would do.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The tonal step between background and surface is the only depth signal.

dos: Do use the tonal step (background to surface at L=93%) as the only depth mechanism.
Do use priority colors as full-card background tints at 10% opacity, not as side-stripe borders.
Do keep the accent to 10% or less of any given screen.
Do use Inter across the entire UI. One family, three weights (400/500/600).
Do test every text color against its background for 4.5:1 contrast.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism — no backdrop-filter blur, no semi-transparent backgrounds, no glass-border effects.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Single solid color only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left / border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't pair a 1px border with a box-shadow blur 16px+ on the same element.
Don't exceed 12px border-radius on cards. 10px on inputs and buttons.
Don't use z-index values outside the semantic scale (10/20/30/40/50/60).
Don't animate layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
